texto: Hope was what kept the world going. Hope that one day you would find somebody you could love and trust, hope that you would never lose them; hope that your team won the cup this year; hope that you found that dream job; hope that you would find the money to pay the mortgage. But most of all, hope that one day - whatever you have told yourself over that years - you would find that life really does go on beyond the deathbed.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Phil Ford sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “Hope was what kept the world going. Hope that one day you would find somebody you could love and …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a motivacao, belief, death, útil em momentos de luto e death.
